name: Fire King Avatar Kirin
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>炎</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>えん</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>王</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>おう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>獣</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>じゅう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby> キリン
desc: If a face-up "Fire King" monster(s) you control is destroyed by card effect (except during the Damage Step): You can Special Summon this card from your hand. If this card is destroyed and sent to the GY: You can send 1 FIRE monster from your Deck to the GY.
mnst_eff: If a face-up "Fire King" monster(s) you control is destroyed by card effect (except during the Damage Step): You can Special Summon this card from your hand. If this card is destroyed and sent to the GY: You can send 1 FIRE monster from your Deck to the GY.
eff: If a face-up "Fire King" monster(s) you control is destroyed by card effect (except during the Damage Step): You can Special Summon this card from your hand. If this card is destroyed and sent to the GY: You can send 1 FIRE monster from your Deck to the GY.

sets.set: Onslaught of the Fire Kings Structure Deck

jp_sets.set: Structure Deck: Onslaught of the Fire Kings
Structure Deck R: Onslaught of the Fire Kings

action: Activates if destroyed by card effect
Sends from your Deck to your Graveyard
summoning: Special Summons itself from your hand
